# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: S3 bucket for user-uploaded files and application backups with full read/write access for the application IAM role.

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for storing user uploads and application backups
    AllowedPattern: ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$
    ConstraintDescription: Bucket name must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and periods.

  ApplicationRoleName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the existing IAM role used by the application
    Default: ApplicationRole

Resources:
  StorageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      AccessControl: Private
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: UserUploadsAndBackups
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  StorageBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref StorageBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowApplicationRoleFullAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${ApplicationRoleName}
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads
              - s3:ListMultipartUploadParts
              - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt StorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub ${StorageBucket.Arn}/*

  ApplicationS3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub ${BucketName}-access-policy
      Description: Grants full read/write access to the storage bucket for the application role
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApplicationRoleName
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFullS3Access
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
              - s3:ListBucketMultipartUploads
              - s3:ListMultipartUploadParts
              - s3:AbortMultipartUpload
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt StorageBucket.Arn
              - !Sub ${StorageBucket.Arn}/*

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the created S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref StorageBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-BucketName

  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the created S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt StorageBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn

  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Domain name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt StorageBucket.DomainName

  AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM managed policy granting access to the bucket
    Value: !Ref ApplicationS3AccessPolicy
